criteria.reason: Default disabled runtime does not create reservations.
Runtime-enabled branch creates a real reservation after ready preflight.
Internal stub branch immediately releases the reservation as rollback.
Idempotency key is preserved into reservation creation.
No external calls, parsequeue jobs, AI generation, writes, or charges are enabled.
Docs and verification artifacts are present.

commands_run: python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_operator_credit_reservation.py tests/test_operator_paid_action_adapter.py tests/test_operator_paid_executor.py tests/test_operator_paid_preflight.py tests/test_operator_consent_policy.py tests/test_operator_paid_actions.py tests/test_operator_attention.py tests/test_operator_audit.py tests/test_telegram_dashboard_copy.py
